reviews.review_description: this game has major potential to be big in the vr world! i love this game myself i play it almost everyday when i can get the chance hoping i can run into someone who shares the same love for it as i do! the game could use some improvements regarding little bug glitches or more zombie variants and whatnot but otherwise it needs to be revived with some sort of big update! my friends all got the game and we almost refunded it but held back because we believe with enough support of the community we can bring this game back to be something huge!

Man, I was really hoping for a DayZ VR experience. Even 50% of it would be nice but the reality is that this game should not even be in Early Access. It’s’more like an Alpha and even that might be generous. The game mechanics are not very intuitive. Numerous bugs. Poor melee which should be priority for a zombie game. The graphics are not great. Overall this game is still a few years out if they can make it work. Would not recommend buying at the moment. This game should honestly be free with its current status or looked at as a demo.

Hello developers, I know you're very busy with your other game, Ghost of Tabard, but I implore you not to abandon Silent North, a game with immense potential and a unique atmosphere. Keep releasing updates to enhance it, expand it, and add numerous teams and enemies, making it a true survival game.

First of all every lobby is empty, and that's the way the rest of the game feels. It's just too big for such a small player base and I got zero enjoyment out of this game the gunplay feels terrible and feels sloppy. 10/10 do not recommend

reviews.review_title: This game is dead and abandoned
reviews.review_description: Silent North was decent when it came out but now there haven't been any updates or any upcoming information from the devs. Also there are no players in any of the servers. Stay away from any game related to Combat Waffle Studios. They ruined Silent North. They ruined Grim. They have also ruined Ghosts of Tabor with massive bug problems with each update to where I can't even play it anymore.

I play this game currently for my YouTube Channel, OneGoldToof. This game is amazing! But the negative is because of wasted potential. So many great additions could be added to this game to improve it and make it better. I stopped playing for a while cause of life and what not, but when I came back I expected there to be some sort of update to the game. Nope. A whole lot of the same issues as before. So it makes it hard to play the game because now all you can do is literally go around and find zombies to kill and loot. There’s no player interaction due to no one playing the game anymore. Please focus on this game some more from what I hear this is yalls best game. Please make it better!
devs abandoned this game which is a shame but its still okay

They did not finish this game, so im not finishing this rev

reviews.review_title: I want to love it... they're so close!
reviews.review_description:
I've been following this game for months and hopping on occasionally to see if they've done anything new. It's a great idea with okay execution, but there's no one on the servers. It can be hard to get started but it's quite easy once you get the hang of it (don't stress about dying. Eventually, you'll find that mp5 on spawn)

I fear CW has canned the game though. No updates for a hot minute even though there's glaring bugs they warn you about on login. 
Maybe they can sell the game to Triangle Factory and they can work their magic on it 👀

This game isn’t worth the money it sucked. My meta quest 2 crashed when I pre ordered the game cause it looked like this was gonna be a great game. When I purchased my new quest to replace my bricked quest it was already past due to redeem a refund so basically was stuck with this horrible game.

My friend and I enjoyed playing the game. Has cool aspects like the flashlight and cool night skies. We went through the entire thing and have been waiting for almost a year for an update. We understand the early access and bugs which can be annoying but again early access. The servers are dead which is fine because the people that have been playing for a much longer time are bored and they just sit on top of the mountain just to snipe anyone that comes around for lack of anything else to do. I do not recommend unless you want to chalk the spending of $20 as entertainment as in going to a movie one time. No replay ability.

They surrounded me. Shot the 1st guy twice with a sniper then magdump him with an mp5. He just stared at me and one tapped me with the mk2. Both of em knew exactly where i was at all time as well. To put it all together, good game, bunch of hackers
It was a good game, it has great potential still, but the devs gave up. This game could be the literal DayZ of VR but the devs just gave up.
Ya

There aren't many servers and most of them are dead, which is cool if you want to wander solo, but lead to the only interactions being the occasional zombie. If the devs actually keep their heads down on this then I can't wait to see what it turns into in a year but at the moment just dont buy it, focus on another survival game.

reviews.review_title: Kinda like a big open empty sandbox
reviews.review_description: It's fun when it works, but now it's been broken, and the backpack will or will not store your items you're constantly struggling to pick up items and it will show some weapons or melee weapons in a box and it doesn't let you get it and to stick firewood it won't let you put the firewood in the fireplace it's kinda a mess right now and on Quest and other platforms you will start from the beginning again having to loot all over after you did a five to maybe three hours of play time and still restart Gathering resources a bit of annoying and the game isn't ready the zombies hitbox aren't registering at times you get hit randomly and some times end up dying from players who has a squad of people the servers need a solar player or knowing that you can join solo or Non Solo games

reviews.review_title: An Insult to VR and to Consumers
reviews.review_description:
As a player, I can say this is one of the worst experiences I’ve had in years. The mechanics feel outdated, unpolished, and virtually every aspect of the game is plagued with bugs. Even the hand positioning is incorrect, and the height calibration system constantly glitches. These aren’t just Early Access issues—they reflect a serious lack of care and technical oversight. I felt genuinely disappointed as a consumer, and even more so, frustrated by the careless state in which this product was released. This doesn’t feel like Early Access—it feels like a cash grab.
 
As a VR developer, I’m honestly surprised at how something this unpolished and poorly designed could be released by a studio that already profited significantly from Tabor. I say this not out of arrogance, but from genuine concern: I’m developing my own VR title completely solo, with no budget, and yet polish and attention to detail remain priorities. It’s difficult to understand how a studio with far greater resources couldn’t achieve a basic level of quality. Releases like this damage the perception of VR as a serious platform and make it harder for the industry to grow.
 
One detail that stood out was the backpack model. It looks as if it was generated with AI or auto-baked incorrectly—black patches and texture artifacts give it a broken, unfinished look. These kinds of visual errors only reinforce the impression of a rushed and careless production.
I walked away from this experience not just disappointed, but deeply concerned about the direction some VR projects are taking. Players deserve better. The VR community deserves better.

developer_response.body:
Hello Poitier.Artist,

Thanks for sharing your feedback on the game. We appreciate you taking the time!

We did want to clarify that no AI was used in creating the art assets. Our models were all handcrafted by our internal artists, and you can definitely see their unique touch in the work. While we understand art styles are subjective and ours might not be for everyone, the claim that they are AI-generated is inaccurate.

We're proud of the distinctive style our team developed, and it's been really well-received by most of our players. We're sorry to hear it didn't resonate with you, but we wanted to set the record straight regarding the hard work of our artists.

Thanks for understanding.
-Mikael

Cash grab. 3 months of radio silence. Wannabe DayZ with people who think their game is harder

It feels like they have a direction but no way to get there. Game isn’t bad as some reviews suggest but it really isn’t that good either. Hopefully the next update is soon but the devs have been mia for about 3-4 weeks now so who knows. The idea is so good but the execution needs a bit of work. If you’re looking to buy it I say get it and wait. $20 is a bit much for this ea title but that’s cws for u. reviews.review_title: Not really good, feel ripped off
reviews.review_description: Graphics aren't good. Game play is about as boring as it gets. Even for an alpha game this is pretty bad.

reviews.review_title: THIS IS A PROPER UNBIASED REVIEW
reviews.review_description: All the other reviews are either Tabor Glazers or Tabor Haters, so here's an actual real review of what to expect. Right off the bat it's pretty boring and frustrating. You die to zombies because there is barely any loot and you are walking a lot because the maps are big, but the towns are scarce. There's also a lot (and I mean a lot) of bugs. Crouching is annoying, holstering doesn't work right, servers are unreliable, fps can be inconsistant and expect your items to just vanish. There are a ton of stuff like that. But most of that stuff is fixable. Still had some fun moments, gunned down a bunch of guys then died to a guy with a cricket bat because my gun disappeared, which wasn't very funny at the time but in retrospect it's pretty funny. With all the DayZ still like handcuffing I can definitely assure that you will have a unique experience with every person you meet. The game is most definitely not polished, but if you don't mind waiting a bit and would like some fun with some bugs on the side I would recommend.

You update grim but not this it has been a year since the last hot fix not even a update a hot fix and why release if you’re not going to do anything and not talk about it ever again. Please don’t buy this game ￼

reviews.review_title: Terribly unfinished, even for an alpha
reviews.review_description: The game in its current state is nearly unplayable. The textures and models for everything are half baked. The melee combat is choppy at best. The guns aren't even loadable despite having the correct ammo for each. And even if these were not problems, there is no map or compass to direct the player, and there is no clear direction to go. 1/10 do not purchase.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you did not like the game, yum.420705.
The textures and models are custom made and not half baked. It may be a visual style you don't personally enjoy, we can understand that since it is a very specific style of art.
Melee combat definitely can get improved on and is something we do plan on doing.
The guns are loadable. Make sure to eject the magazine while holding the gun and pushing the lower button of your controller. Once the magazine is out, pull a new one from your hip using trigger, and put it in the weapon. Rack it back and you are ready to shoot!
There is a map to direct the players. It is accessible via the menu (click on menu button) and clicking on "map" or holding the menu button to access it (shortcut). The map shows your position, locations and the entire world.
Join our community if you want more help to navigate around the map and find people to play with : discord.gg/SilentNorth
-Mikael

reviews.review_description: The rubber banding is a little overwhelming. I dont need you to reposition me, i need you to reposition my avatar for everyone else. Grim had this terrible issue as well and its such a poor development choice. Validate position delta changes on the server instead of authoritatively moving my local player to where the server wants. The server select screen has deceptively low ping numbers, probably just from an initial single packet TTS round trip ping and not the round trip made once inside the game networking where the round trip latency is X amounts higher than what is displayed, which causes players to rubber band and hand/arm movements are jittery instead of trying to smoothly Lerp between positions. VAST EMPTY WASTELAND OF NOTHING. This game needs a new development team and a rethinking of the core of the game.
Lots of issues and i got to the north and didn't know what to do

I love dayz. I love vr. A vr dayz?? Hell yes!
This game is not that, at all. Don’t purchase it expecting something even close to it. When I read pre release reviews and watched footage of gameplay, it was labeled as that (vr dayz) and it looked like it could be close enough yet still have a fresh spin on it. I get that dayz is a mod from an already finished game, but this is borderline unplayable. I won’t even be returning to it. 

I couldn’t get past an hour before complete boredom, lack of loot spawning and poor fps making me just load up another game.

As of right now,  I’m disappointed in the game and maybe in a year, I’ll give it another chance to see if anything’s been improved or if it’s still just buggy, broken trash. But in all honesty, I’ll probably never touch it again.

(Yes I know what early access means, yes this was far too early access for apparently 30% of the player base, yes the game is falsely advertised as a vr dayz, yes I will adjust the review if I ever try it again and they improve it drastically)

reviews.review_title: Good job devs keep up the good work
reviews.review_description:
So my honest opinion, the game right now is
 not great. There is so much that this game could have it's crazy. The map/graphics vary horrible. it's planier than vinila icecream. 🤣
There are a bunch of things no other game has that I love, like arms hands, back packs characters. You guys have done a great job with those. Now the things that NEED CHANGES.  

1 better graphics better textures like mountains all that houses need lot of work they look terrible. That is one of the biggest things that need change 

2 highr loot chances I have gotten hunting hat and beanie that's all I have gotten since I got the game so please add higher loot spawns 

3 climbing gear/snow gear I think you should add crampons so when you like go north in the snow if you go without them you will slip a lot like no traction. I think that would be really good. And for climbing gear you would be able to climb the mountains I think that would also be really good. 

4 just adding more to the maps so it's not so plain 

5 building. So you could get supplies like stuff to make a shelter are a tent and able to make a fire so when you go north you have all that

6 more items lots more items for survival like compass, flint and steal, pots pans stuff for survival 

I love this game, the open world map zombie survival. Yes there is lots of jank but I ain't worried about all that because it is early access. In the next year are sooner I hope this game will be really good. You guys keep up the development never stop 👏👏 good job guys 

Also, you guys did a great job with the sky, the clouds, night, and day amazing. And to all the people reading this I think you should buy the game it will help them with the development. It's great to be apart of this development yes there will be bugs, and all that but you guys will work it out. Can't wait for the game to get better ⛺️⛺️🔥🔥🔥

reviews.review_title: To early to tell but VERY PROMISING

reviews.review_title: I'll be honest where others aren't.
reviews.review_description:
This game is great. Are there bugs, yes. Do those bugs get fixed within a week or two? Yes. All these complaints are from people exaggerating how "bad" the game is.

Something to remember is that this is early access, and to be honest. This is the ONLY game of CWS that I liked. Is it perfect? Absolutely not. But is it horrible? FAR FROM IT!!

This game is so addictive.
I saw a review that said loot barely spawned, and zombies kill you too quickly. Guess what? Loot problem, fixed. Zombies, you just suck at killing them. 

All of these reviews are biased. 


I love it. SILENT NORTH is an amazing game and I very much encourage buying this!!

I have nothing good to say about this. Yes, it's an alpha, and I am rating the alpha accordingly. Your weapons randomly disappear, you float in the sky, the game crashes, it takes 20 attempts to grab anything and countless other bugs. Make the game normally playable and I will write a review that is fitting. But right now, nobody should buy, or even play this.

developer_response.body:
Hey FreeAnon,
Sorry to hear you are experiencing issue. Some of them are unknown to us. For example, it never took us 20 attempts to grab an item. I would like if you can provide us more details on the issue you experienced at discord.gg/SilentNorth using the bug report tool.
We are definitely committed to improve the overall quality and content of the game.
-Mikael

reviews.review_description: I’m never going to play this again first no weapons no zombies and to big of a map. At least add cars I walked for an hour and got killed by some low life kid. I would rather get kidnapped by the cartel and have them beat me to death with a baseball bat. I'm warning you don't get wait until GTA 6 is out so never play.

developer_response.body:
Hey volt1108,
There are weapons, there are zombies and the map is big, indeed. There are no cars, but there is a snow mobile coming to the game. I understand you are angry because a kid got the best of you, but it doesn't mean they were low life... I am sorry to read your review and see how you judge people and experiences when they get the best of you.
-Mikael
